code: import axios from"axios";const API=axios.create({baseURL:"http://localhost:5000/api"});API.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem("token");if(token){config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);}return config;});export const getOrganizationTree=()=>API.get("/organization/tree");export const getReportees=id=>API.get("/employees/".concat(id,"/reportees"));export const assignManager=(id,manager)=>API.patch("/employees/".concat(id,"/manager"),{manager});
